◆ read_parameter_file()

int read_parameter_file ( )

Definition at line 47 of file ReadParamfile.c.

48{
49 FILE *fd;
50 char buf[SBLENGTH], buf1[SBLENGTH], buf2[SBLENGTH], buf3[SBLENGTH], buf4[SBLENGTH];
51 int i, j, nt, number_of_fields;
52 int id[MAXTAGS];
53 void *addr[MAXTAGS];
54 char tag[MAXTAGS][SBLENGTH];
55 double z;
56
57 if (!ThisTask)
58 {
59
60 nt = 0;
61 int idx_NumMassPlanes = -1; /* track presence to inform user if missing */
62 int idx_MassMapNSIDE = -1;
63 int idx_MassMapMasterMaxGB = -1;
64
65 /* list of requested parameters */
66 strcpy(tag[nt], "RunFlag");
67 addr[nt] = params.RunFlag;
68 id[nt++] = STRING;
69
70 strcpy(tag[nt], "OutputList");
71 addr[nt] = params.OutputList;
72 id[nt++] = STRING;
73
74 strcpy(tag[nt], "BoxSize");
75 addr[nt] = &params.BoxSize;
76 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
77
78 strcpy(tag[nt], "BoxInH100");
79 addr[nt] = &params.BoxInH100;
80 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
81
82 strcpy(tag[nt], "GridSize");
83 addr[nt] = &(params.GridSize[0]);
84 id[nt++] = INT;
85
86 strcpy(tag[nt], "RandomSeed");
87 addr[nt] = &params.RandomSeed;
88 id[nt++] = INT;
89
90 strcpy(tag[nt], "Omega0");
91 addr[nt] = &params.Omega0;
92 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
93
94 strcpy(tag[nt], "OmegaLambda");
95 addr[nt] = &params.OmegaLambda;
96 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
97
98 strcpy(tag[nt], "OmegaBaryon");
99 addr[nt] = &params.OmegaBaryon;
100 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
101
102 strcpy(tag[nt], "Hubble100");
103 addr[nt] = &params.Hubble100;
104 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
105
106 strcpy(tag[nt], "Sigma8");
107 addr[nt] = &params.Sigma8;
108 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
109
110 strcpy(tag[nt], "PrimordialIndex");
111 addr[nt] = &params.PrimordialIndex;
112 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
113
114 strcpy(tag[nt], "DEw0");
115 addr[nt] = &params.DEw0;
116 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
117
118 strcpy(tag[nt], "DEwa");
119 addr[nt] = &params.DEwa;
120 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
121
122 strcpy(tag[nt], "TabulatedEoSfile");
123 addr[nt] = params.TabulatedEoSfile;
124 id[nt++] = STRING;
125
126 strcpy(tag[nt], "FileWithInputSpectrum");
127 addr[nt] = params.FileWithInputSpectrum;
128 id[nt++] = STRING;
129
130 strcpy(tag[nt], "InputSpectrum_UnitLength_in_cm");
131 addr[nt] = &(params.InputSpectrum_UnitLength_in_cm);
132 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
133
134 strcpy(tag[nt], "WDM_PartMass_in_kev");
135 addr[nt] = &(params.WDM_PartMass_in_kev);
136 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
137
138 strcpy(tag[nt], "BoundaryLayerFactor");
139 addr[nt] = &params.BoundaryLayerFactor;
140 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
141
142 strcpy(tag[nt], "MaxMem");
143 addr[nt] = &params.MaxMem;
144 id[nt++] = INT;
145
146 strcpy(tag[nt], "MaxMemPerParticle");
147 addr[nt] = &(params.MaxMemPerParticle);
148 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
149
150 strcpy(tag[nt], "PredPeakFactor");
151 addr[nt] = &(params.PredPeakFactor);
152 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
153
154 strcpy(tag[nt], "CatalogInAscii");
155 addr[nt] = &params.CatalogInAscii;
156 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
157
158 strcpy(tag[nt], "OutputInH100");
159 addr[nt] = &params.OutputInH100;
160 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
161
162 strcpy(tag[nt], "NumFiles");
163 addr[nt] = &params.NumFiles;
164 id[nt++] = INT_SKIP;
165
166 strcpy(tag[nt], "MinHaloMass");
167 addr[nt] = &params.MinHaloMass;
168 id[nt++] = INT;
169
170 strcpy(tag[nt], "AnalyticMassFunction");
171 addr[nt] = &params.AnalyticMassFunction;
172 id[nt++] = INT;
173
174 strcpy(tag[nt], "WriteTimelessSnapshot");
175 addr[nt] = &params.WriteTimelessSnapshot;
176 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
177
178 strcpy(tag[nt], "DoNotWriteCatalogs");
179 addr[nt] = &params.DoNotWriteCatalogs;
180 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
181
182 strcpy(tag[nt], "DoNotWriteHistories");
183 addr[nt] = &params.DoNotWriteHistories;
184 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
185
186 strcpy(tag[nt], "StartingzForPLC");
187 addr[nt] = &params.StartingzForPLC;
188 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
189
190 strcpy(tag[nt], "LastzForPLC");
191 addr[nt] = &params.LastzForPLC;
192 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
193
194 strcpy(tag[nt], "PLCAperture");
195 addr[nt] = &params.PLCAperture;
196 id[nt++] = DOUBLE;
197
198 strcpy(tag[nt], "PLCProvideConeData");
199 addr[nt] = &params.PLCProvideConeData;
200 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
201
202 strcpy(tag[nt], "PLCCenter");
203 addr[nt] = &(params.PLCCenter);
204 id[nt++] = DOUBLE3;
205
206 strcpy(tag[nt], "PLCAxis");
207 addr[nt] = &(params.PLCAxis);
208 id[nt++] = DOUBLE3;
209
210 strcpy(tag[nt], "FixedIC");
211 addr[nt] = &(params.FixedIC);
212 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
213
214 strcpy(tag[nt], "PairedIC");
215 addr[nt] = &(params.PairedIC);
216 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
217
218#ifdef TABULATED_CT
219 strcpy(tag[nt], "CTtableFile");
220 addr[nt] = params.CTtableFile;
221 id[nt++] = STRING;
222#endif
223
224#ifdef READ_PK_TABLE
225 strcpy(tag[nt], "CAMBMatterFile");
226 addr[nt] = params.camb.MatterFile;
227 id[nt++] = STRING;
228
229 strcpy(tag[nt], "CAMBRedshiftsFile");
230 addr[nt] = params.camb.RedshiftsFile;
231 id[nt++] = STRING;
232#endif
233
234#ifdef READ_HUBBLE_TABLE
235 strcpy(tag[nt], "HubbleTableFile");
236 addr[nt] = params.HubbleTableFile;
237 id[nt++] = STRING;
238#endif
239
240 strcpy(tag[nt], "DumpProducts");
241 addr[nt] = &params.DumpProducts;
242 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
243
244 strcpy(tag[nt], "ReadProductsFromDumps");
245 addr[nt] = &params.ReadProductsFromDumps;
246 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
247
248 strcpy(tag[nt], "ExitIfExtraParticles");
249 addr[nt] = &params.ExitIfExtraParticles;
250 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
251
252 strcpy(tag[nt], "UseTransposedFFT");
253 addr[nt] = &(params.use_transposed_fft);
254 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
255
256 strcpy(tag[nt], "MimicOldSeed");
257 addr[nt] = &(internal.mimic_original_seedtable);
258 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
259
260 strcpy(tag[nt], "DumpSeedPlane");
261 addr[nt] = &(internal.dump_seedplane);
262 id[nt++] = INT_SKIP_DEF;
263
264 strcpy(tag[nt], "DumpKDensity");
265 addr[nt] = &(internal.dump_kdensity);
266 id[nt++] = INT_SKIP_DEF;
267
268 strcpy(tag[nt], "VerboseLevel");
269 addr[nt] = &(internal.verbose_level);
270 id[nt++] = INT_SKIP_DEF;
271
272#ifdef MASS_MAPS
273 /* Mass maps parameters */
274 strcpy(tag[nt], "MassMapNSIDE");
275 addr[nt] = &params.MassMapNSIDE;
276 id[nt++] = INT_SKIP_DEF; /* required if MASS_MAPS active */
277#endif
278
279 strcpy(tag[nt], "LargePlane");
280 addr[nt] = &(internal.large_plane);
281 id[nt++] = LOGICAL;
282
283 strcpy(tag[nt], "Constrain_dim0");
284 addr[nt] = &(internal.constrain_task_decomposition[0]);
285 id[nt++] = INT_SKIP_DEF;
286
287 strcpy(tag[nt], "Constrain_dim1");
288 addr[nt] = &(internal.constrain_task_decomposition[1]);
289 id[nt++] = INT_SKIP_DEF;
290
291 strcpy(tag[nt], "Constrain_dim2");
292 addr[nt] = &(internal.constrain_task_decomposition[2]);
293 id[nt++] = INT_SKIP_DEF;
294
295 for (j = 0; j < nt; j++) /* All logical tags are FALSE by default */
296 if (id[j] == LOGICAL)
297 *((int *)addr[j]) = 0;
298
299 printf("Reading parameters from file %s\n", params.ParameterFile);
300 fflush(stdout);
301
302 if ((fd = fopen(params.ParameterFile, "r")))
303 {
304 while (!feof(fd))
305 {
306 *buf = 0;
307 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, fd);
308 number_of_fields = sscanf(buf, "%s %s %s %s", buf1, buf2, buf3, buf4);
309 if (number_of_fields < 1)
310 continue;
311
312 if (buf1[0] == '#' || buf1[0] == '%')
313 continue;
314
315 /* searches for a match with the tag list */
316 for (i = 0, j = -1; i < nt; i++)
317 if (strcmp(buf1, tag[i]) == 0)
318 {
319 j = i;
320 tag[i][0] = 0;
321 break;
322 }
323
324 if (j >= 0)
325 {
326 switch (id[j])
327 {
328 case DOUBLE:
329 if (number_of_fields < 2)
330 j = -10;
331 else
332 *((double *)addr[j]) = atof(buf2);
333 break;
334
335 case STRING:
336 if (number_of_fields < 2)
337 j = -10;
338 else
339 strcpy(addr[j], buf2);
340 break;
341
342 case INT:
343 if (number_of_fields < 2)
344 j = -10;
345 else
346 *((int *)addr[j]) = atoi(buf2);
347 break;
348
349 case INT_SKIP:
350 if (number_of_fields < 2)
351 j = -10;
352 else
353 *((int *)addr[j]) = atoi(buf2);
354 break;
355
356 case INT_SKIP_DEF:
357 if (number_of_fields < 2)
358 j = -10;
359 else
360 *((int *)addr[j]) = atoi(buf2);
361 break;
362
363 case INT3:
364 if (number_of_fields < 4)
365 j = -10;
366 else
367 {
368 *((int *)addr[j]) = atoi(buf2);
369 *((int *)addr[j] + 1) = atoi(buf3);
370 *((int *)addr[j] + 2) = atoi(buf4);
371 }
372 break;
373
374 case DOUBLE3:
375 if (number_of_fields < 4)
376 j = -10;
377 else
378 {
379 *((double *)addr[j]) = atof(buf2);
380 *((double *)addr[j] + 1) = atof(buf3);
381 *((double *)addr[j] + 2) = atof(buf4);
382 }
383 break;
384
385 case LOGICAL:
386 *((int *)addr[j]) = 1;
387 break;
388
389 default:
390 break;
391 }
392
393 if (j < 0)
394 {
395 printf("ERROR on task 0: file %s, Tag %s has no argument.\n",
396 params.ParameterFile, buf1);
397 fflush(stdout);
398 return 1;
399 }
400 }
401 else
402 {
403 printf("ERROR on task 0: file %s, Tag %s is unknown.\n",
404 params.ParameterFile, buf1);
405 fflush(stdout);
406 return 1;
407 }
408 }
409 fclose(fd);
410 }
411 else
412 {
413 printf("ERROR: Parameter file %s not found.\n", params.ParameterFile);
414 return 2;
415 }
416
417 /* Checks that all parameters are found */
418 for (i = 0; i < nt; i++)
419 {
420 if (*tag[i])
421 {
422 if (id[i] == LOGICAL || id[i] == INT_SKIP || id[i] == DOUBLE3)
423 *((int *)addr[i]) = 0;
424 else if (id[i] != INT_SKIP_DEF)
425 {
426 printf("ERROR on task 0: I miss a value for tag '%s' in parameter file '%s'.\n", tag[i], params.ParameterFile);
427 fflush(stdout);
428 return 1;
429 }
430 }
431 }
432
433 /* Now opens and reads the list of wanted outputs */
434 outputs.n = 0;
435 if ((fd = fopen(params.OutputList, "r")))
436 while (!feof(fd))
437 {
438 *buf = 0;
439 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, fd);
440 if (buf[0] != '#' && buf[0] != '%' && sscanf(buf, "%lf", &z) != EOF)
441 outputs.z[outputs.n++] = z;
442 if (outputs.n == MAXOUTPUTS)
443 {
444 printf("ERROR on task 0: too many output redshifts in file %s\n", params.OutputList);
445 printf(" increase MAXOUTPUTS in pinocchio.h\n");
446 fflush(stdout);
447 return 1;
448 }
449 }
450 else
451 {
452 printf("Error on task 0: file %s not found\n", params.OutputList);
453 fflush(stdout);
454 return 1;
455 }
456 fclose(fd);
457 outputs.zlast = outputs.z[outputs.n - 1];
458
459 if (outputs.n <= 0)
460 {
461 printf("ERROR on task 0: no valid lines found in file %s\n", params.OutputList);
462 fflush(stdout);
463 return 1;
464 }
465
466 params.GridSize[1] = params.GridSize[2] = params.GridSize[0];
467
468#ifdef MASS_MAPS
469 /* Validate MassMapNSIDE */
470 if (params.MassMapNSIDE <= 0) {
471 printf("ERROR on task 0: MassMapNSIDE must be > 0 when MASS_MAPS is compiled.\n");
472 fflush(stdout);
473 return 1;
474 }
475 if ( (params.MassMapNSIDE & (params.MassMapNSIDE - 1)) != 0) {
476 printf("ERROR on task 0: MassMapNSIDE=%d is not a power of two.\n", params.MassMapNSIDE);
477 fflush(stdout);
478 return 1;
479 }
480#endif
481 }
482
483 /* processor 0 broadcasts the parameters to all other processors */
484 MPI_Bcast(&params, sizeof(param_data), MPI_BYTE, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
485 MPI_Bcast(&internal, sizeof(internal_data), MPI_BYTE, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD); // PERCHE' QUI?
486 MPI_Bcast(&outputs.n, sizeof(output_data), MPI_BYTE, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
487
488 return 0;
489}
